title: agelanthus longipes
intro: Agelanthus longipes, also known as the "witch thorn" or "karee thorn", is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Loranthaceae family of flowering plants. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Agelanthus longipes is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
